c74object.name: tap.buffer.record~
c74object.digest: loop recording for single-channel buffers with fade in of new material
c74object.description: loop recording for single-channel buffers with fade in of new material

objarg.name: name
objarg.digest: Name of the buffer to reference
objarg.description: Name of the buffer to reference.

method.name: set
method.digest: Choose a named buffer~ from which to read
method.description: Choose a named buffer~ from which to read.

attribute.name: fade
attribute.digest: The number of samples over which to blend in new input
attribute.description: The number of samples over which to blend in new input.
